detail.title: Care program
detail.riskModerateTip: Make sure say you drink water, keep warm and take your medicine today.
detail.riskHighTip: Drink water small-small, rest and keep warm. Your care lead fit see dis one too.
detail.riskCriticalTip: Take extra care today. If pain start, or chest pain or breathing wahala dey, find care sharp-sharp.
detail.crisisLoggedCritical: We don log di crisis — we don alert your care lead. If di pain serious, or chest pain or breathing wahala dey, find urgent care now.
detail.crisisLoggedWarning: We don log di crisis — we don tell your care lead. Take care of yourself.
detail.labSavedFlagged: We don save di results — some values need your doctor attention, and we don alert your care lead. No change your medicine dose by yourself.
detail.labSaved: We don save di lab results and share am with your care lead.

detail.labsEmpty: No lab result yet. After your next blood test (CBC), enter di results here so your care lead fit monitor your medicine safely.

help.title: Help & support
help.heading: How we fit help?
help.subheading: Check common questions or reach our care support team.
help.faqTitle: Question wey people dey always ask
help.faqBookQ: How I go take book appointment?
help.faqBookA: Open doctor profile, tap "Book appointment", choose consultation type, pick date and time slot, then confirm and pay.
help.faqPrivateA: Yes. All consultations and messages dey encrypted and confidential, na only you and your doctor fit see am.
help.faqVideoA: For your appointment time, open di appointment and tap "Join video call". Make sure say your internet dey strong.
help.faqRxQ: How I go take get prescription?
help.faqRxA: After your consultation, your doctor fit issue digital prescription wey go show for your appointment details.
help.faqCancelQ: How I go take cancel or reschedule?
help.faqCancelA: Open di appointment from di Appointments tab and tap "Cancel appointment". Refund go follow our cancellation policy.
